message:
feat(fsqlite-core): expand core engine with region allocator and benchmarks

Substantial expansion of the core crate:

- lib.rs: add ~1100 lines of core engine infrastructure including
  connection state management, statement compilation pipeline,
  VDBE opcode definitions, and the schema-loading subsystem
- region.rs (new): region-based memory allocator for scratch and
  lookaside allocation pools used during query execution
- benches/symbol_ops.rs (new): micro-benchmarks for symbol table
  operations to establish performance baselines
- Cargo.toml: add criterion and new dependencies for benchmarking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
